rationale.completeness: Adds type annotations to BaseOperator, Sensor, and Hook base classes as requested, but some methods like get_conn still return Any and Context type is used without visible import in operator.py.
rationale.correctness: Type annotations are technically sound - Mapping[str, Any] is more flexible than dict, frozenset return is correct, and __slots__ addition is appropriate. However, the hash_components annotation list[type | Any] is unusual.
rationale.style: Follows Python 3.10+ union syntax conventions and existing code style. Docstrings added to some methods are appropriate but inconsistently applied across all modified methods.
rationale.quality: Code is clean and well-structured with good improvements like __slots__ and __repr__ on PokeReturnValue. Minor quality gaps exist but overall maintainable.
